_comment: AAI hook-enforced gates overlay (RFC-0010 / spec-hook-enforced-gates). OPT-IN: nothing installs this automatically — run .aai/scripts/aai-bootstrap.sh --with-claude-hooks to merge the 'hooks' key into the project's .claude/settings.json (existing settings are merged additively, never overwritten; unparseable files are refused with a manual-merge instruction). Absence of this overlay leaves behavior unchanged on every platform — the .aai scripts remain the cross-platform gate floor (Codex/Gemini/older Claude). Every hook is a thin adapter call into .aai/scripts/claude-hook-gate.sh, which only routes to EXISTING gates (pre-commit-checks.sh; constitution articles 6/7) and fails OPEN on its own errors; each command below additionally guards the adapter's absence so a hooks-only install degrades to a no-op. Guardrail, not a security boundary.
